description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a global before_script installing bundler with `gem install bundler --no-ri --no-rdoc` and executing `bin/setup` before every job. Add a rubocop job that runs `rubocop -D`. Add four test jobs named `test:2.1`, `test:2.2`, `test:2.3`, and `test:2.4`, each using the Docker images `ruby:2.1`, `ruby:2.2`, `ruby:2.3`, and `ruby:2.4` respectively, and each executing `bundle exec rake test`. All jobs run in the default test stage with no caches, artifacts, or special rules.
